response.step_by_step_log: I analyzed the video and noticed the song title "幸せになって" and the credit "Lyrics, Music: Ryuga" displayed on screen at the 00:59 mark. I used the search query "幸せになって Ryuga Japanese and English lyrics" to find the lyrics. The search results confirmed the song is "Shiawase ni Natte" by MaRuRi to Ryuga, with lyrics and music by Ryuga. I extracted the original Japanese lyrics and provided an English translation based on the lyrical meaning.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual performance of the song "Shiawase ni Natte" (Be Happy), originally by MaRuRi to Ryuga. The video begins with a short dialogue interval followed by the musical performance.

scenes.description: Two Vtuber characters are sitting by a campfire in a space-themed setting. They are chatting.
The song title "幸せになって" and creator "Ryuga" appear on-screen. The characters begin performing the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
何度も問いかけた 自問自答繰り返した先に
答えがあるのなら このまま探してみようか
あなたの未来図に 私は少しでもいれたかな
あなたのいない世界は 想像さえつかなかった
もしもあなたが あの子を選んだ瞬間に
私が頭の中 駆け巡っていたの
こんなにもあなたのこと 好きになってしまう前に
せめてさ さよならの言葉告げて欲しかったなんて
勝手でワガママだよね
誰より想ってるのに あなたを世界で1番笑顔に
変えられる人はきっと 私じゃないから
どうか幸せになって
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I asked myself many times, asking again and again
If there's an answer at the end of this self-inquiry
Should I keep searching like this?
Could I be in your future plan, even just a little?
I couldn't even imagine a world without you
If you chose that girl in that moment
It ran through my head
Before I came to like you this much
At least, I wish you had told me a goodbye
It's selfish and demanding, isn't it?
Even though I think of you more than anyone
The person who can make you smile the most in the world
Definitely isn't me
So please, be happy
